steps.title: Read values from graph
steps.content: From the graph, at $x = 0$, $y = 0$ cm; at $x = 5$, $y = 3$ cm.

steps.title: Compute average rate of change
steps.content:
Average rate of change = $\frac{y(5)-y(0)}{5-0} = \frac{3-0}{5} = \frac{3}{5} = 0.6$ cm/h. The answer is 0.6/.

Equivalent forms accepted: 0.6/, 3/5.
